results.rendered_html: tapta—kṛcchra m. n. a kind of religious austerity (drinking hot water, milk, and ghee for 3 days each, and inhaling hot air for 3 days),  Mn. xi, 157  and 215 ;  Yājñ. iii, 318.

results.rendered_html: taptakṛcchra (tapta + kṛcchra) m.n. die heisse Busse, Bez. einer best. Busse, bei der man nur Heisses geniesst: taptakṛcchraṃ caranvipro jalakṣīraghṛtānilān . pratitryahaṃ pibeduṣṇānsakṛtsnāyī samāhitaḥ ..  M. 11,214 . 156 .  YĀJÑ. 3,318 .
